inline_comments.message:
NB: Usually the plugin dependencies we keep inside plugins element like below
        </plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-resources-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.3.1</version>
            </plugin>
         </plugins>
I think in dependency management we don't keep plugins.
